title: Panorama ScreenMake
description: Seamless high-res panoramas in a single click
body:
## Panorama ScreenMake - Unlock Vanilla Panoramas!

Ever wanted to create your own panoramas? This mod unlocks a hidden, unused feature in the vanilla game to do just that! It uses the exact same code Mojang uses, ensuring perfect, high-quality results with minimal overhead.

## Features
- **True Vanilla Experience:** Uses Mojang's own hidden panorama code.
- **Feather-Light:** Incredibly lightweight with zero performance impact during normal gameplay.
- **One-Press Simple:** Just press a single key (`F4` by default) to start the process.
- **Fully Automated:** No need to mess with your FOV or resize your window. The mod handles everything.
- **Configurable:** Easily change the keybinding in the standard Controls menu.
- **Organized Output:** Saves your six panorama images neatly into the `.minecraft/panoramas/` folder.
---
![Panoramas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1585f66b0a593b62731628e04b91ab6a50ab5106_0.webp)
[![Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/513035d1231a86dff137c74e04a5e64633593f10.png)](https://fabricmc.net/)
[![Quilt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9ee492fd1a5fcbcc14d4105aa27be63f2518529.png)](https://quiltmc.org/)
## How to Use
1. **Find your scene:** Go to the location where you want to capture the panorama.
2. **Press the key:** Press **F4** (or whatever you've configured).
3. **Done!** The game will automatically turn, capture six images, and notify you in chat when finished.
---
_Enjoy creating your own beautiful Minecraft panoramas!_
